title: Fake Holiday Villa Websites Prompt Warning
subtitle: 假冒度假别墅网站骗局频发

paragraphs.en: During the British winter, the thought of two weeks in a coastal villa with soul-stirring views of the sea and a huge pool to enjoy is enough to offset the labor until the holidays start. For a growing number of people, however, their yearly break is turning into a nightmare as they find that the property they have paid thousands for does not exist and the website through which they booked it has disappeared. Consumers have been warned to be aware of the potential for deception in this market, which is far from uncommon.
paragraphs.zh: 在英国的冬天，一想到能在海滨别墅住上两周，欣赏动人心魄的海景，还有巨大的泳池可供享用，就足以抵消假期到来前的辛劳。然而，对于越来越多的人来说，他们的年度假期正变成一场噩梦：他们发现花了几千英镑租下的别墅根本不存在，而预订网站也已消失无踪。消费者已被提醒要警惕这个市场中的欺诈行为，这种情况并不少见。

paragraphs.en: In 2017 there were 1,632 cases of reported villa fraud, with victims losing an average of £2,052, according to Action Fraud, the national center for reporting such frauds. "Millions of pounds are lost each year by defrauded holidaymakers," says Sean Tipton of the Association of British Travel Agents. The problem has ballooned in the last 10 years, with frauds becoming more and more sophisticated.
paragraphs.zh: 据英国国家欺诈举报中心Action Fraud的数据，2017年共报告了1632起别墅诈骗案，受害者平均损失2052英镑。英国旅行社协会的肖恩·蒂普顿表示：「受骗的度假者每年损失数百万英镑。」过去十年来，诈骗手段越来越复杂，问题急剧膨胀。

paragraphs.en: The fake websites have authentic-sounding names involving a mix of keywords, typically including the place name, "summer", "villas" or "rentals". Details of legitimate villas are often stolen from other sites. "When the fraudsters first started it was unsophisticated — the websites looked amateur and there wasn't a lot of effort," says Tipton. "Now they are clever. They extensively rip off legitimate websites and use a different website name. They'll have pictures of a sales team and it might be a poor actor in New York that is down as their head of sales."
paragraphs.zh: 假冒网站的名称听上去很真实，混合了多种关键词，通常包括地名、「夏天」、「别墅」或「出租」。合法别墅的详细信息经常被从其他网站盗取。蒂普顿说：「骗子刚开始时手法很粗糙——网站看起来很业余，也没花多少心思。现在他们精明多了，大量抄袭正规网站再换个名字。他们会放上销售团队的照片，可能是纽约的某个三流演员充当销售主管。」

paragraphs.en: Fraudsters target popular seaside destinations for British tourists visiting Spain where prices can soar if demand exceeds supply. Prices are kept within reasonable ranges to avoid arousing suspicion. "A villa might cost £5,000 elsewhere and they will offer it at say £3,500. But a bit of a giveaway is that the villa will be cheaper than on other websites and there's unlimited availability," says Tipton. Fraudsters also invest in pay-per-click advertising to feature at the top of search engines when people type in phrases such as "Spanish seaside villas".
paragraphs.zh: 骗子专门瞄准英国游客前往西班牙的热门海滨目的地，那里供不应求时价格会飙升。价格被控制在合理范围内以免引起怀疑。蒂普顿说：「一栋别墅在别处可能要5000英镑，他们会以3500英镑出售。但一个破绽是，价格会比其他网站便宜，而且随时有房。」骗子还投资点击付费广告，当人们搜索「西班牙海滨别墅」等词时出现在搜索结果顶部。

words.meaning: n. 泄露真相的迹象；破绽

paragraphs.en: With such a degree of professionalism, how can consumers find out if the website they're looking to book with is trustworthy? "When people book holiday villas they are doing so through rose-colored glasses," says Tony Neate, chief executive of Get Safe Online. "They should be Googling the property, and looking on websites like Google Maps and Street View to see if it's there. Also, speak to the person you're booking the villa with on a landline phone, as fraudsters tend to only use mobiles." He also suggests asking someone not going on the holiday to have a look at the website. "They might spot problems you don't spot."
paragraphs.zh: 如此专业的手法下，消费者怎样才能判断预订网站是否可信？Get Safe Online首席执行官托尼·尼特说：「人们预订度假别墅时都戴着玫瑰色眼镜。他们应该先在谷歌上搜索该房产，用谷歌地图和街景查看它是否真实存在。另外，用座机电话联系别墅预订方，因为骗子往往只用手机。」他还建议请一个不参加度假的人帮忙查看网站，「他们可能会发现你没注意到的问题。」

paragraphs.en: Another potential red flag is being asked to pay by bank transfer. "The problem is that when the money leaves your account it's in theirs straightaway and it's very hard to track it," says Barclays Bank head of digital safety, Jodie Gilbert. "We generally recommend other forms of payment, like credit card." Little seems to be known about these fraudsters. "There is no way to definitely know who they are," says Neate. "It could be anyone. It could be your next-door neighbor or organized crime in Russia."
paragraphs.zh: 另一个危险信号是被要求通过银行转账付款。巴克莱银行数字安全主管乔迪·吉尔伯特说：「问题在于钱一离开你的账户就立刻进入他们手中，很难追踪。我们通常建议使用信用卡等其他支付方式。」关于这些骗子，人们似乎知之甚少。尼特说：「没有办法确切知道他们是谁，可能是任何人——可能是你的隔壁邻居，也可能是俄罗斯的有组织犯罪。」

paragraphs.en: Action Fraud says people should ensure the company renting the villa is a member of a recognized trade body such as ABTA. "By working with industry partners such as ABTA and Get Safe Online, we are able to issue alerts about the latest threats they should be aware of. If you believe you have fallen victim to fraud or cyber-crime, please report it to Action Fraud," it adds.
paragraphs.zh: Action Fraud建议人们确保租赁别墅的公司是ABTA等公认行业机构的成员。该机构补充道：「通过与ABTA和Get Safe Online等行业合作伙伴合作，我们能够就他们应注意的最新威胁发出警报。如果你认为自己已成为欺诈或网络犯罪的受害者，请向Action Fraud举报。」

paragraphs.en: ABTA says it is trying to combat the issue by running public awareness campaigns. "It's a growing problem and people can't stop fraudsters being dishonest," says Tipton. "They're still going to do it. It's not impossible to stop but as it's internet-based it's harder to pursue." Nick Cooper, the founder and co-owner of villa booking company Villa Plus, estimates his company has uncovered more than 200 fake villa websites over the past two years, and doesn't believe enough is being done.
paragraphs.zh: ABTA表示正通过开展公众意识宣传活动来应对这一问题。蒂普顿说：「这个问题越来越严重，人们无法阻止骗子的不诚实行为。他们还会继续这么做。要阻止并非不可能，但因为是基于互联网的，追查更加困难。」别墅预订公司Villa Plus的创始人兼合伙人尼克·库珀估计，他的公司在过去两年发现了200多个假别墅网站，但他认为目前的应对措施远远不够。

paragraphs.en: "It is hopeless to report fake villa websites to the internet giants who host them," he says. "I found it impossible to speak to anyone. Also, once one bank account gets reported, they simply use another." For now the only way to stop fraudsters appears ultimately to lie in the hands of the consumer. "When people book their holidays they get so emotionally involved, and when they find that villa at a good price with availability in peak season, they are an easy target," says Cooper. "The public has to learn to be far more aware they are a target for these sort of frauds."
paragraphs.zh: 他说：「向托管这些网站的互联网巨头举报假冒别墅网站毫无希望，我发现根本联系不上任何人。而且一旦一个银行账户被举报，他们就换另一个。」目前，阻止骗子的唯一办法似乎最终还是要靠消费者自己。库珀说：「人们预订假期时会非常投入情感，当他们发现一栋价格优惠、旺季有房的别墅时，就很容易上当。公众必须学会更加警惕自己是此类骗局的目标。」

paragraphs.en: But it's not just the financial cost. "A family will turn up at a villa and find out it doesn't exist or the owner doesn't know who you are," says Tipton. "The problem then is you have to find accommodation at short notice. It can be incredibly expensive but it's the emotional cost, too." Carla O'Shaughnessy from Sydenham was searching last year for a good deal to book a villa in Majorca for a summer break for the family.
paragraphs.zh: 但这不仅仅是经济损失。蒂普顿说：「一家人到了别墅所在地，却发现它根本不存在，或者房主根本不认识你。接下来的问题是你必须临时找住处，不仅可能贵得离谱，情感上的打击也很大。」来自赛登汉姆的卡拉·奥肖内西去年在网上搜寻优惠，想在马略卡岛为家人预订一栋暑假别墅。

paragraphs.en: "I was comparing prices online and found one that came in a bit cheaper than others," says O'Shaughnessy. She emailed the company via its website, asking how far the villa was from the airport and about local restaurants. "They came back with believable answers; it was all very friendly and professional," she says. Happy with the responses, O'Shaughnessy paid the full amount of £3,000 via bank transfer into the travel agent's account and then forgot about it until a month before the booking.
paragraphs.zh: 「我在网上比较价格，发现有一栋比其他的便宜一点，」她说。她通过公司网站发邮件，询问别墅离机场多远以及当地有哪些餐厅。「他们给出了可信的回复，一切都非常友好和专业。」对回复很满意后，她通过银行转账全额支付了3000英镑到旅行社账户，然后直到预订前一个月才想起这事。

paragraphs.en: "I tried logging on to the website and couldn't," she recalls. "I Googled the agent's name and there were lots of complaints about him being a fraudster. If only I'd Googled before but I never thought of it." Although she found another villa in time for their holiday, she admits she was much more cautious. "I paid through a secure third-party site and had phone conversations with the agent. But I wasn't able to relax until we turned up and I had the keys."
paragraphs.zh: 「我试着登录那个网站，却怎么也打不开，」她回忆道。「我在谷歌上搜了那个代理的名字，发现大量投诉说他是骗子。要是我之前搜过就好了，但我从来没想到过。」虽然她及时找到了另一栋别墅，但她承认自己变得谨慎多了。「我通过安全的第三方网站付款，还和代理通了电话。但直到我们到达并拿到钥匙，我才真正放下心来。」
